# Vedvik Machinery

> Vedvik Machinery is a packaging machinery manufacturer and supplier based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. We manufacture pick-fill-seal (PFS) machines, secondary automation, and film processing machines (slitting, printing, lamination) in-house, and are the official Indian representative for leading international packaging machinery brands: Effytec (Spain), Filtec Automation (South Africa), Varpe (Spain), E2M Couth (Spain), MF Tecno (Italy), MapleJet (Canada), Comipack (Italy), Boato Pack (Italy), GMS (Italy), and Kraus (Germany).

We supply packaging, filling, and inspection machinery to FMCG, pharmaceutical, food, dairy, agrochemical, and chemical manufacturers across India and the Indian subcontinent.

Contact: vikrant@vedvikmachinery.com | +91 8155892080
Address: E401, Savvy Swaraaj Aakanksha Phase 1, Gota, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India - 382481

## Packaging Machines

- [Horizontal Form Fill Seal (HFFS) – Effytec, Spain](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/HFFS): High-speed HFFS pouch packing machines (HB series), up to 320 pouches/min, for spouted, shaped and ziplock pouches. Vedvik Machinery is the official Effytec representative in India.
- [Liquid Filling Lines – Filtec Automation, South Africa](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/Liquid-Filling): Rotary weight-based and volumetric filling, 50 ml–50 L, up to 400 BPM, CIP/SIP ready for FMCG and pharma.
- [Pick Fill Seal (PFS) – Vedvik Machinery, India](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/PFS): In-house manufactured PFS machines for doy packs, ziplock and corner-spout pouches, up to 60 cycles/min.
- [Bulk Packing (5–50 kg) – MF Tecno, Italy](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/Bulk-Packing): Heavy-duty HFFS/VFFS bulk bagging up to 600 bags/hour with palletising.
- [Stick Packing – Boato Pack, Italy](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/Boato-Pack): Stick pack and sachet machines, 4,000+ sachets/min.
- [Clipping & Twisting – Comipack, Italy](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/Comipack): Bag clipping and twist-tying systems for bakery and fresh produce.
- [Secondary Automation – Vedvik Machinery, India](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/Secondary-Automation): Cartoning, case packing, and shrink wrapping.

## Inspection & Quality Control

- [Checkweighers – Varpe, Spain](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/Checkweighers): Dynamic inline checkweighers, 5 g–15 kg, up to 300 packs/min, OIML/CE certified.
- [X-ray & Metal Detectors – Varpe, Spain](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/xray-metal-detector): Foreign body detection for food and pharma safety.
- [Vision Inspection – E2M Couth, Spain](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/Inspection): Camera-based inspection for caps, labels, fill level, and seals, up to 1200 units/min.
- [Printers & Coders – MapleJet, Canada](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/Printing): TIJ/CIJ/laser coding for batch codes, dates, and barcodes.

## Film Processing (Manufactured In-House)

- [Film Processing Overview](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/roller-unwinders): Slitting, printing, and lamination machines for flexible packaging manufacturers.
- [Slitting Machines](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/slitting-machine): Servo-driven slitters, web width up to 1600 mm, up to 400 m/min.
- [Printing Machines](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/printing-machine): Flexographic and gravure presses, up to 8 colours.
- [Lamination Machines](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions/lamination-machine): Solvent-less and dry lamination, up to 1600 mm web width.

## Key Pages

- [All Solutions](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/solutions): Full catalogue of packaging and inspection machinery.
- [Industries Served](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/industries): Pharmaceuticals, food & snacks, beverages, dairy, edible oils, agrochemicals, seeds, personal care, detergents, spices, pet food, chemicals, bakery, nutraceuticals, coffee & tea.
- [About Vedvik Machinery](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/about): Company background and partner brands.
- [Blog](https://www.vedvikmachinery.com/blog): Buying guides and technical explainers on packaging machinery.

## Common Questions We Answer

- Who represents Effytec in India? Vedvik Machinery, Ahmedabad, is the official Indian representative of Effytec, Spain.
- Who supplies Varpe checkweighers and X-ray inspection in India? Vedvik Machinery.
- Where to buy HFFS pouch packing machines in India? Vedvik Machinery supplies Effytec HFFS machines with local application support from Ahmedabad, Gujarat.
- Who manufactures pick fill seal (PFS) machines in India? Vedvik Machinery manufactures PFS machines in-house in Ahmedabad.
